scripts.lint: biome check packages/sdk/src packages/core/src packages/excel/src packages/excel/vite.config.ts packages/powerpoint/src packages/powerpoint/vite.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write packages/sdk/src packages/core/src packages/excel/src packages/excel/vite.config.ts packages/powerpoint/src packages/powerpoint/vite.config.ts
scripts.format: biome format --write packages/sdk/src packages/core/src packages/excel/src packages/excel/vite.config.ts packages/powerpoint/src packages/powerpoint/vite.config.ts
scripts.check: tsc -b packages/sdk packages/core packages/excel packages/powerpoint && biome check packages/sdk/src packages/core/src packages/excel/src packages/excel/vite.config.ts packages/powerpoint/src packages/powerpoint/vite.config.ts && pnpm validate
scripts.validate: pnpm --filter @office-agents/excel exec office-addin-manifest validate manifest.xml && pnpm --filter @office-agents/excel exec office-addin-manifest validate manifest.prod.xml && pnpm --filter @office-agents/powerpoint exec office-addin-manifest validate manifest.xml && pnpm --filter @office-agents/powerpoint exec office-addin-manifest validate manifest.prod.xml
